default.speaker: Director Higgins
default.text: Ah, you must be the new counselor! Finally!

default.speaker: Pink Panther
default.text: Good afternoon. Pink Panther, at your service.

default.speaker: Director Higgins
default.text: Yes, yes. Welcome to Camp Chilly Wa Wa.

default.speaker: Director Higgins
default.text: The kids are through the gate. Go introduce yourself.

default.speaker: Director Higgins
default.text: They're a good bunch. A little... eccentric, but good.

post.speaker: Director Higgins
post.text: Go on, the kids are waiting in the camp grounds!

worried.speaker: Director Higgins
worried.text: Something is wrong with the kids.

worried.speaker: Director Higgins
worried.text: Marcus has been up all night drawing things he's never seen.

worried.speaker: Director Higgins
worried.text: Buildings, paintings, rooftops... from places he's never been!

worried.speaker: Pink Panther
worried.text: I saw him last night by the campfire. He was... not himself.

worried.speaker: Director Higgins
worried.text: I've seen this kind of thing before... well, no I haven't. But it's NOT normal!

worried.speaker: Director Higgins
worried.text: A glass pyramid, a woman's face... it sounds like Paris. The Louvre.

worried.speaker: Director Higgins
worried.text: Here, take this travel map. Camp Chilly Wa Wa Air can get you there.

worried.speaker: Director Higgins
worried.text: Don't ask questions. Just go find out what Marcus is connected to.

postWorried.speaker: Director Higgins
postWorried.text: Have you talked to Marcus yet? He's in the camp grounds.

postWorried.speaker: Director Higgins
postWorried.text: And the other kids might have noticed something too.
